$comment: Enforced local-data contract. Every LibreSpot-owned persistent or temporary location declares its writer, schema, sensitivity, retention, deletion, support-export, and redaction behavior.

dataLocations.description: Saved user-scope install configuration and customization preferences.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May contain custom patch source URLs and detailed Spotify customization preferences; never contains credentials by design.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Persists until Remove LibreSpot Data or manual deletion.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete %APPDATA%\LibreSpot\config.json
redactionRules: Redact local paths, URLs, query strings, tokens, and credentials from the health projection

dataLocations.description: Optional machine-scope fleet configuration selected with --scope machine.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains deployment and customization preferences but no accepted answer-file secrets.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Persists until an elevated RemoveSelfData run or manual deletion.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Run RemoveSelfData elevated, or delete %ProgramData%\LibreSpot\config.json as an administrator

dataLocations.description: Unreadable or invalid user configuration retained for manual recovery.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May contain malformed raw configuration and arbitrary values from a damaged file.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Retained until Remove LibreSpot Data or manual review and deletion.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the quarantined file after review

dataLocations.description: Named local profiles containing complete install configurations.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains user-selected themes, extensions, patch options, descriptions, and custom patch metadata.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Each profile persists until deleted in Profiles or all LibreSpot data is removed.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Profiles > Delete profile, or Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data
redactionRules: Never export profile contents in support bundles

dataLocations.description: Pointer to the profile whose configuration is currently active.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains a local profile identifier and timestamp only.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Updated transactionally on profile activation.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data
redactionRules: Do not reveal local profile identifiers

dataLocations.description: Previous active-profile pointer used for safe rollback after activation failure.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains a local profile identifier and timestamp only.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Replaced by the next successful profile activation.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data
redactionRules: Do not reveal local profile identifiers

dataLocations.description: Cross-process lock, pending transaction marker, and staged old/new configuration files for crash-consistent profile activation.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Staged files contain raw current and next configuration snapshots.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Recovery deletes valid stages and the marker after roll-forward or rollback; an empty lock file may remain for reuse.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Automatic recovery, or Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data
redactionRules: Never export staged old or new configuration
Never export the pending transaction marker

dataLocations.description: PowerShell install and maintenance log.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May contain local paths, Spotify versions, command output, and exception details.
dataLocations.retentionNote: The backend truncates the file at the beginning of a run.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the file
redactionRules: Replace user and LibreSpot root paths
Redact secrets, tokens, credentials, and private-network endpoints

dataLocations.description: Bounded JSONL journal of planned and completed mutations.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains mutation targets, rollback references, error text, and local paths.
dataLocations.retention: 1 MiB maximum, compacted to approximately 768 KiB
dataLocations.retentionNote: Optimize-OperationJournalRetention runs before append and retains the newest complete lines.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the file
redactionRules: Omit previousState, previousStateRef, oldValue, and previousValue fields

dataLocations.description: Latest operation receipt and undo-token references.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May contain previous-state references, local targets, and failure summaries.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Atomically replaced after each completed operation.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the file
redactionRules: Never export raw previous-state references or operation payloads

dataLocations.description: Auto-reapply state, version observations, timestamps, and last outcome.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Failure strings may contain local paths or command output.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Atomically replaced on each watcher tick.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or disable the watcher and delete the file

dataLocations.description: Headless auto-reapply watcher log.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May contain local paths and errors from an unattended patch run.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Write-WatcherLog compacts the file after it exceeds 1 MiB.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the file

dataLocations.description: Stable-shell latest-release lookup cache.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains release tag, URL, and update-available state only.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Stale content is ignored and replaced after a successful lookup.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the file

dataLocations.description: Stable-shell cache of upstream staleness notices.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains timestamps and public dependency notices only.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Stale content is ignored and replaced after a successful lookup.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the file

dataLocations.description: Latest Marketplace repair/apply/open visibility evidence.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May contain Spicetify paths and raw apply/open error messages.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Replaced after Marketplace repair or open evidence changes.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the file
redactionRules: Replace paths, command arguments, tokens, and credentials in projected fields

dataLocations.description: Latest preservation/recovery outcome and retained-snapshot reference.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains snapshot/config/custom-app paths and recovery errors.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Replaced on each preservation or recovery attempt.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the file

dataLocations.description: Locally generated, opt-in support and failure bundles at the WPF default destination.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contents are redacted but intentionally contain selected diagnostics and environment metadata.
dataLocations.retentionNote: LibreSpot never uploads or automatically expires exported bundles.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Delete the archive, or Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data when stored at the default destination
redactionRules: Archive contents are locally redacted before write
Never recursively include existing support archives
dataLocations.aclExpectation: current-user inherited ACL from the destination

dataLocations.description: SHA-256-addressed verified payload cache and its asset-cache-index.json metadata.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Payloads are public upstream assets; the index contains source URLs that may carry query strings.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Cleared only through Clear Cache, Remove LibreSpot Data, or integrity quarantine of an individual entry.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Clear Cache, Clear-LibreSpotCache, or Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data
redactionRules: Redact paths, URL query strings, and credentials from index projection

dataLocations.description: WPF latest-release and git-reference lookup cache.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains public dependency metadata, timestamps, and failure categories.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Replaced after successful live metadata resolution; stale values remain available for degraded mode.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the file
redactionRules: Export only normalized dependency status and public URLs

dataLocations.description: WPF cache of pinned and latest community asset metadata.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains public repository metadata, timestamps, and failure categories.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Replaced after successful live metadata resolution; stale values remain available for degraded mode.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the file
redactionRules: Export only normalized asset status and public URLs

dataLocations.description: WPF desktop rolling Serilog logs.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May contain local paths, exception messages, command status, and operation details.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Serilog retainedFileCountLimit is 14.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete %LOCALAPPDATA%\LibreSpot\logs
redactionRules: Capture only the newest three files

dataLocations.description: WPF crash reports with exception and runtime details.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Full exception strings may contain paths, environment details, and partial command output.
dataLocations.retentionNote: CrashReporter removes crash files older than 30 days during initialization.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete %LOCALAPPDATA%\LibreSpot\crashes
redactionRules: Capture only the newest three files

dataLocations.description: Immutable SHA-256-verified backend script, sidecar, and per-process execution copies.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains only embedded LibreSpot PowerShell code and hash metadata.
dataLocations.retention: canonical copy plus active process copies
dataLocations.retentionNote: Stale execution copies are cleaned on startup and each run copy is deleted after execution.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Automatic cleanup, Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete the directory while LibreSpot is closed
dataLocations.aclExpectation: current user and Administrators only; inheritance disabled

dataLocations.description: Fleet CLI NDJSON operation logs.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May contain deployment targets, health findings, operation IDs, errors, and local paths.
dataLocations.retentionNote: NdjsonLogWriter rotates the directory after creating each new file.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Run RemoveSelfData elevated, or delete %ProgramData%\LibreSpot\logs as an administrator
redactionRules: Include only when the fleet log directory is explicitly selected

dataLocations.description: User-created Spicetify backups and crash-safety preservation snapshots, each capped at five copies per set.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May contain user-authored Spicetify configuration, themes, extensions, and custom app files.
dataLocations.retention: five rotating backups and five rotating preservation snapshots
dataLocations.retentionNote: Each producer removes older directories after a successful new snapshot.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete %USERPROFILE%\LibreSpot_Backups
redactionRules: Expose only a redacted preservation summary

dataLocations.description: Exact before/after user-PATH snapshots used only by the policy-backed low-risk undo executor.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains the user's complete unexpanded PATH before and after one LibreSpot entry was added.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Expired snapshots are removed when the next executable PATH undo state is captured; Remove LibreSpot Data removes the entire root.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data, or delete %APPDATA%\LibreSpot\undo-states
redactionRules: Operation-journal and receipt exports omit previousStateRef values

dataLocations.description: Per-operation download/extraction directories, isolated script output, watcher copies, restore workspaces, and elevation bootstrap payloads.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: May temporarily contain upstream scripts, command output, local paths, or copied configuration needed for the active operation.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Callers delete workspaces in finally blocks; OS temp cleanup is the fallback after process or power failure.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Close LibreSpot and delete matching LibreSpot entries under %TEMP%
redactionRules: Never scan or export temporary workspaces

dataLocations.description: Path-free receipt written after normal LibreSpot roots have been removed.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Contains result labels and timestamps, never raw removed paths or rollback payloads.
dataLocations.retentionNote: Replaced by the next removal and eventually removed by user or OS temp cleanup.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Delete %TEMP%\LibreSpot\remove-self-data-receipt.latest.json
redactionRules: Writer must not include raw paths, profile contents, or previous state

dataLocations.description: Scheduled task for auto-reapply at logon and on its repetition interval.
dataLocations.sensitivityNote: Task XML contains the executable/script path and launch arguments.
dataLocations.retention: until watcher disable or self-data removal
dataLocations.retentionNote: Explicitly unregistered by Disable Watcher and RemoveSelfData.
dataLocations.userDeletePath: Maintenance > Disable Watcher, -UninstallWatcher, or Maintenance > Remove LibreSpot Data
redactionRules: Never export task XML or launch path

invariants: No owned location stores Spotify account credentials, OAuth tokens, session cookies, proxy credentials, or authentication secrets by design
Raw local profiles, profile activation stages, undo-state snapshots, run receipts, backup contents, and temporary workspaces are never included in support bundles
Operation-journal previous-state fields are omitted before support export even when their values do not match another redaction rule
Support bundle export requires user intent, writes locally, and never uploads automatically
User-selected profile exports, imported answer files, and CLI support-bundle destinations outside LibreSpot roots remain user-owned files and are outside RemoveSelfData scope
RemoveSelfData removes user, local, machine, and backup roots but deliberately writes a path-free temporary receipt after deletion
